title: Lo que
subtitle: Say what / the thing that.
overview: Lo que is useful when there is no specific noun before it.
It often means what or the thing that.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: I do not understand what you are saying.

items.en: I do not know what happened.

items.es: Lo que quiero es practicar más.
items.en: What I want is to practice more.

items.es: Lo que más me gusta es la pronunciación.
items.en: What I like most is the pronunciation.

items.es: No me gustó lo que comimos ayer.
items.en: I did not like what we ate yesterday.
